response.justification: Bogdan brings strong technical credentials with 20 years of software engineering experience and current involvement in AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq. However, the role requires demonstrated AI product/platform expertise and strategic advisory experience with enterprise customers—neither of which is evident in the resume. His background is primarily execution-focused rather than strategy-focused, and he lacks the advanced degree in AI that the role prefers. He has the technical foundation to grow into this role but isn't yet positioned as the 'recognized AI expertise' the principal-level position demands.
strengths: 20 years of diverse engineering experience across multiple technical domains (web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure) with proven ability to master new technologies
Currently engaged with cutting-edge AI tooling through work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, demonstrating current momentum in AI
MIT CS degree plus entrepreneurial track record (founded and maintains GISCollective), showing technical credibility and independent vision
concerns: No demonstrated shipping of AI products or platforms; current AI work appears infrastructure-focused rather than strategic or product-facing
Missing evidence of strategic advisory experience with enterprise customers or C-suite partnerships; background emphasizes technical execution over business strategy
No Master's degree or PhD in AI/ML field; lacks formal advanced training in AI that the role explicitly prefers

key_factors.factor: No demonstrated AI product success or recognition
Current AI infrastructure involvement shows trajectory
Strong technical depth but limited strategic advisory track record
